race.comment: Competitive contest. REWRITE (5) is a consistent conveyance who has only missed a drum once in five career starts and that was a close-up fourth in town two back. Maps ideally for this from gate four and gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim. Should prove very hard to hold out. ALLEZE (7) hasn't put a hoof wrong winning both career outings to date and looks ready for the step-up in trip now. Right in this contest. WILIAMTHECONQUEROR (6) was a touch disappointing last time out but the form prior was full of merit. Worth another chance. FASVARA (4) is one from one over this distance range and must be respected out of the Lees yard. In the mix. BREEZIN' (3) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be slept on.
